stemHtml: What is the safe amount of caffeine consumption in coffee or tea?

options.a: 2-3 coffees or 4-5 teas (with the recomended daily caffeine intake of 250-300 mg).
options.b: 3-4 coffees or 2-3 teas (with the recommended daily caffeine intake of 350-400 mg).
options.c: 5-6 coffees or 3-4 teas (with the recommended daily caffeine intake of 450-500 mg).
options.d: Caffeine has no effect on the safe conduction of a flight.
